steps.name: money-normalize
steps.summary: Money normalization and arithmetic utilities added with TDD coverage for currency cleanup, sign conventions, debit/credit netting, and bigint decimal math.

steps.name: csv-parse
steps.summary: Standard CSV parser added with generic header mapping, summary-row filtering, date normalization, and step0 money normalization reuse.

steps.name: masking
steps.summary: Masking and deterministic source/row hash utilities added with TDD coverage for full identifier non-exposure and raw-value dedup.

steps.name: analysis
steps.summary: Rule-based Free analysis added with category/trend aggregation plus subscription leak and outlier detection, all covered by TDD.

steps.name: orchestration
steps.summary: runAnalysis orchestration wires CSV parsing, masking, rule analysis, injected AI insights, timeout isolation, and pro status response contract.
